commit.message:
fix: add missing sta_keyed_property_with_ptrs function

The inline keyed store fast path referenced sta_keyed_property_with_ptrs
as a fallback but the function was never defined, causing CI compilation
failure on Linux. Add it as a variant of sta_keyed_property_inner that
accepts pre-fetched RtPtrs to avoid TLS lookup on the fast path.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: stator
repository.description: Rust implementation for JavaScript engine

commit.message:
Replace fragmented ScpDriver bookkeeping with QuorumSetTracker and TxSetTracker

Extract seven DashMap fields from ScpDriver into two typed state machines:
- QuorumSetTracker: manages by_node, by_hash, pending, and local qset state
- TxSetTracker: manages tx_set cache, pending requests, and validity cache

All ScpDriver methods now delegate to the appropriate tracker, reducing the
public API surface and consolidating cleanup/lifecycle invariants.

Includes 27 unit tests across both trackers covering all API methods,
edge cases, and cleanup semantics.

Closes #1209

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix nested repetition limit for alternation branches (#144)

* Add \\uhhhh unicode escape support to parser

Parse \\uhhhh (exactly 4 hex digits) in regex patterns, matching JDK
behavior. When a high surrogate is followed by a \\uhhhh low surrogate,
they are combined into a single supplementary code point.

Fixes #133

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add inline flags (?d) and (?u); fix (?U) to mean UNICODE_CHARACTER_CLASS

Add (?d) for UNIX_LINES and (?u) for UNICODE_CASE inline flags.
Remap (?U) from RE2's NON_GREEDY to JDK's UNICODE_CHARACTER_CLASS,
which enables both UNICODE_GROUPS and UNICODE_CHAR_CLASS.

Fixes #134

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix nested repetition limit for alternation branches

countRepeat was compounding repeat counts across alternation branches
sequentially, treating them as if all branches were visited. For
ALTERNATE nodes, only one branch is taken at match time, so only the
worst-case (most expensive) branch should be considered.

Fixes #135

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(vite): force host 127.0.0.1 to prevent IPv6-only binding causing 502

Vite on macOS may bind to [::1] (IPv6) when started without explicit host.
Tailscale Serve forwards to http://127.0.0.1:19147 (IPv4) → connection refused → 502.

Fix: add server.host: '127.0.0.1' in vite.config.ts to guarantee IPv4 binding.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: Playground Create tab rendering — resolve root component loading

Two bugs fixed:
1. Frontend sent createSurface with ignored 'body' field instead of proper
   createSurface + updateComponents message pair — surfaces were created empty
2. LLM system prompt used nested tree format with wrong type names (TextBlock,
   Container, etc.) instead of flat A2UI format with catalog names (Text, Column)

Added normalizePlaygroundComponents() as safety-net transformer that handles
both flat and nested LLM output, maps unknown types to catalog equivalents,
and ensures a 'root' component always exists.

Fixes #54

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: Spotify playlist download with drag-and-drop, quality selector, concurrent downloads, and duplicate detection

- Spotify embed scraping for playlist tracks (no API keys needed)
- YouTube search download via yt-dlp for each track
- Drag-and-drop track reordering with @dnd-kit
- Audio quality selector (128/192/256/320 kbps)
- 3 concurrent parallel downloads with cancel support
- Duplicate detection via localStorage history with 'Saved' badges
- Sort/shuffle controls (Original, Title, Artist, Shuffle)
- Tabbed UI (Single Tracks / Playlist)
- Unicode-safe filenames (RFC 5987)
- File System Access API for direct folder saving

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: delete_task 改用 CASCADE / sources_cleaned 改為 per-cycle

Issue 1 — delete_task 無條件刪除 processing_lock 的副作用
  原 transaction 先 DELETE processing_lock 再 guarded DELETE conversion_tasks。
  若任務在兩者之間被 process_daemon 搶走（pending→processing），
  lock row 已被刪除但 conversion_tasks DELETE 是 no-op，
  造成有 is_processing=TRUE 卻無 lock row 的不一致狀態。
  修正：移除顯式 DELETE processing_lock，改由 ON DELETE CASCADE 自動清除；
  transaction 精簡為單一 guarded DELETE，以 rowcounts[0] 判斷是否成功。

Issue 2 — sources_cleaned 是 lifetime 累計值，與其他 per-cycle 統計不一致
  scan_directory() 每次重置 files_scanned / tasks_added / errors，
  但 sources_cleaned 用 += 累加，造成語意不一致。
  修正：在 scan_directory() 開頭重置 sources_cleaned = 0，
  run() 改用 = 而非 += 接收 cleanup_deleted_sources() 的回傳值。
  更新相關測試 execute_transaction.return_value 為單元素 list。

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Initial release: LoadLens v1.0.0 — RPS Load Testing & Capacity Planning Toolkit

Features:
- FastAPI server with CPU/IO/mixed/flaky workload endpoints
- Async load generator with token bucket RPS control
- HDR histogram metrics (P50/P95/P99/P999 latency)
- Rate limiter with backpressure monitoring
- Circuit breaker (closed/open/half-open states)
- Connection pool manager with utilization metrics
- Streamlit real-time dashboard with Plotly charts
- Interactive educational CLI (Why 8 RPS is nothing)
- Little's Law capacity planner
- Docker + docker-compose support
- 86 unit and integration tests (100% passing)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: LIKE ESCAPE 改用 ! 避免 MariaDB backslash 字串解析錯誤

原 ESCAPE '\' 在 Python 求值後變成 SQL 的 ESCAPE '\'，
MariaDB 將 \' 解析為 escaped quote，造成字串未終止的語法錯誤。
改用 ! 作為 ESCAPE 字元（! 在 SQL 字串中無特殊意義），

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
[development-frontend-dev-c204] Add feedback components: StatusEmpty, StatusLoading, StatusSuccess, Toast, ToastContainer, AsyncStateView, useToast hook, design tokens and CSS variables

TASK-182: Empty states, loading states, success/error feedback

Components:
- StatusEmpty: Generic reusable empty state with icon, heading, actions
- StatusLoading: Full-area loading state with spinner, message, progress bar
- StatusSuccess: Success confirmation with checkmark, heading, actions
- Toast: Individual toast notification with variant styling and auto-dismiss
- ToastContainer: Fixed-position container for toast notification stack
- AsyncStateView: State orchestrator rendering loading/empty/error/success

Hook:
- useToast: Manages toast lifecycle with add/dismiss/clear and shorthands

Design system:
- feedback.json design tokens for all feedback variants
- feedback-variables.css with CSS custom properties

Tests: 74 tests (67 component + 7 design token tests)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: expense category dropdown defaults to bank card instead of expense account (#10)

The expense category (支出分类) dropdown in the quick entry dialog was using
allAccountOptions() which lists all account types starting with Assets. This
caused Assets:Bank:Checking (银行卡) to appear as the default instead of an
actual expense category like Expenses:Food:Dining.

Changed to use accountOptions(ds, "Expenses") for both the category dropdown
and split bill rows in expense mode, matching the pattern already used for
income mode (which correctly uses Income-only accounts).

commit.message:
feat(research): context-adaptive models & cumulative integral analysis (EXP-1791–1826)

Context-Adaptive Modeling (EXP-1791–1796):
- UAM-aware model is biggest win: R² -6.64 → -3.46 (11/11 improved)
- Hypo recovery nearly solved: R² -7.12 → -0.003
- 89.5% of glucose rises are UAM (no carb entries)
- meal_rise (R²=-44.9) and insulin_fall (R²=-46.1) remain hardest types
- Meal absorption highly variable: CV=60%, mean peak 91±55 min

Cumulative Integral Analysis (EXP-1821–1826):
- Slow features beat raw glucose for 24h prediction (0.220 vs 0.119 bits)
- Demand integral has higher Hurst exponent than supply (1.36 vs 1.24)
- 12h crossover: raw glucose wins short-term, slow features win long-term
- No phase separation in linear models; no low-rank structure at long windows
- Raw cumulative balance uninformative for context prediction

Key production insight: dual-timescale architecture needed:
  Short head (raw glucose+IOB) for 1-6h, slow features for 12-24h

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Remove apply_ic.py, ic_changes.patch and test_closure.js that were

repository.name: stator

commit.message:
perf(maglev): exponential deopt cooldown to prevent retry thrashing

After each Maglev deopt, set a cooldown period of 2^deopt_count
invocations before retrying. This prevents the overhead of repeatedly
entering and immediately deopting Maglev code (e.g. prototype_chain
constructors that always deopt during setup).

With the previous MAX_MAGLEV_DEOPT_RETRIES=10000 and no cooldown,
functions that deopt on every invocation would waste ~500ns per call
in deopt overhead. Now after ~10 deopts the cooldown reaches 1024
invocations, effectively disabling Maglev until warm interpreter
ICs are well-established.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: 修正 source cleanup 的兩個 race condition / SQL 安全問題

Issue 1 — LIKE 未 escape 底線（SQL injection / 路徑誤匹配）
  目錄名稱含 _ 時（如 /mnt/nas_input/），LIKE 模式中的 _ 等同萬用字元，
  導致 get_tasks_for_source_cleanup() 誤匹配其他不相關路徑。
  修正：在 prefix 中將 \、%、_ 分別 escape，並加上 ESCAPE '\' 子句。

Issue 2 — delete_task 無 status 守衛（TOCTOU race condition）
  get_tasks_for_source_cleanup() 查詢到 delete_task() 執行之間，
  process_daemon 可能已搶先將 pending 任務轉為 processing；
  原 DELETE 無條件刪除會造成 ffmpeg 孤兒程序無法被 stale 清理機制發現。
  修正：DELETE 加上 AND status != 'processing' 守衛，
  並改以 rowcounts[1] 判斷是否真正刪除成功。

新增測試：
  - test_task_claimed_by_process_daemon_not_counted
  - TestGetTasksForSourceCleanupEscape::test_underscore_in_path_is_escaped

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
perf(interpreter): bypass RefCell in DefineNamedOwnProperty template fill

Replace map.borrow_mut().try_template_fill() with unsafe raw pointer
access in all three DefineNamedOwnProperty handlers:
- SMI loop handler
- Non-SMI dispatch loop inline handler
- Table dispatch handler (dispatch.rs)

Each object literal with N properties incurs N RefCell borrow_mut()
checks for template fill. For object_creation_1k (3 properties per
object, 1000 objects), this eliminates ~3000 RefCell runtime checks.

SAFETY: Same single-threaded interpreter guarantee as all other unsafe
bypasses in the interpreter.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/SharpMUSH/SharpMUSH/sessions/118f0cec-9927-47ad-a1ed-952d49da6a25

Co-authored-by: HarryCordewener <5649138+HarryCordewener@users.noreply.github.com>

* Revert test files to main: remove aggressive player isolation that caused slowdowns and failures

The previous approach of creating isolated players for every test added ~54
player creations per test run, significantly increasing duration from ~6-7min
to 12+ min. Tests also had 3 failures in CI.

Reverted all test files to origin/main state. Kept only the two production
bug fixes:
- ChannelList.cs: call NotifyService.Notify before returning CallState
- LockService.cs: use string.IsNullOrEmpty for null lock safety

Full test suite: 0 failures, 2544 succeeded, 188 skipped, 6m 49s duration.

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/SharpMUSH/SharpMUSH/sessions/136fe66b-cf0b-4d04-969a-d57ad8d0f2eb

Co-authored-by: HarryCordewener <5649138+HarryCordewener@users.noreply.github.com>

* Restore test isolation: use MatchingObject(executor) in Notify assertions without isolated players

Re-apply the Notify assertion improvements from b596b22 that replace
Arg.Any<AnySharpObject>() with TestHelpers.MatchingObject(executor) in
all test Notify assertions. This uses the existing God player (handle 1)
instead of creating isolated players for every test.

Also includes TestHelpers.WaitForAttribute() and WaitForNotification()
polling helpers from 41b36d0 to replace fragile Task.Delay() waits.

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/SharpMUSH/SharpMUSH/sessions/449ce1e4-3e71-4863-a342-a7d8b656ecb5

Co-authored-by: HarryCordewener <5649138+HarryCordewener@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix DoListBatchesToOtherPlayers: use Arg.Any for @pemit #2 target receiver

The @pemit #2 sends to player #2, not the executor (#1). The Notify
assertion receiver must use Arg.Any since the target is a different object.

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/SharpMUSH/SharpMUSH/sessions/449ce1e4-3e71-4863-a342-a7d8b656ecb5

Co-authored-by: HarryCordewener <5649138+HarryCordewener@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(dashboard): canonicalToolName regex and GroupRow aria-controls validity

canonicalToolName: replace regex `/^mcp__[^_]+__/` with split-on-`__`
approach so MCP server names containing underscores or dashes are
handled correctly (e.g. `mcp__my_server__toolName`).

GroupRow: always render the `aria-controls` target div in the DOM
(hidden via `class="hidden"` when collapsed) so the ARIA reference
is valid regardless of expanded state.

commit.message:
Switch from private to public ECR using AWS Public ECR Gallery

Changed ECR repositories to use aws_ecrpublic_repository for true public access.

Changes:
- Replaced aws_ecr_repository with aws_ecrpublic_repository
- Removed old private repository policies and lifecycle policies
- Updated to use us-east-1 provider for public ECR (required)
- Updated outputs to show public.ecr.aws URLs

Result:
- Repositories now accessible at: public.ecr.aws/SERVICE_NAME
- No AWS authentication required to pull images
- Anyone on the internet can pull images
- AWS credentials still required to push images

Public URLs:
- public.ecr.aws/appointment_service
- public.ecr.aws/catalog_service
- public.ecr.aws/customer_service
- public.ecr.aws/frontend_service

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
